display_name: Memorandum of Understanding between Two Parties (Indian Contract Act, 1872)
structural_summary: An understanding between two Indian parties recording intent to collaborate. Layout: centred title "Memorandum of Understanding"; date and place of execution; parties block describing each party with address, designated "First Party" and "Second Party"; WHEREAS recitals on background and shared intent; NOW THEREFORE operative clauses — purpose and scope, roles and responsibilities of each party, financial arrangements (if any), term and termination with written notice, confidentiality, a clarification clause stating the MOU is a statement of intent with only specified clauses (confidentiality, dispute resolution, governing law) binding; dispute resolution (good-faith negotiation, then arbitration or courts); governing law and jurisdiction city; IN WITNESS WHEREOF testimonium; signature blocks of both parties with witnesses.
statutory_requirements:
- Title the document "Memorandum of Understanding"; state the date and place of execution.
- Identify both parties with full names and addresses; designate them "First Party" and "Second Party" (collectively, "the Parties"); for a company party, note authorised signatory.
- Open with WHEREAS recitals stating background and shared intent.
- Define purpose and scope; set out each party's roles and responsibilities in separate clauses.
- Record financial contributions or consideration, if any, in INR figures and words.
- State the term in months and termination by prior written notice, specifying the notice period.
- Include a confidentiality clause that survives termination.
- Include a binding/non-binding clarification: the MOU records intent and is not a binding contract, except specified clauses (confidentiality, dispute resolution, governing law) which bind the Parties; enforceability of binding clauses rests on the Indian Contract Act, 1872 (name the Act, no section needed).
- Dispute resolution: good-faith negotiation first, then arbitration (customarily under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996) or courts.
- Governing law: laws of India; exclusive jurisdiction of courts at the named city.
- Stamp duty depends on the state of execution [VERIFY: applicable State Stamp Act schedule entry for an agreement/MOU]; do not quote a duty amount in the document.
- Registration is generally not required unless the MOU creates rights in immovable property [VERIFY: Registration Act, 1908 compulsorily-registrable categories].
- Close with IN WITNESS WHEREOF, signature blocks for both parties, and witness attestation.

fields.name: party_a_company_name
fields.description: First Party entity name (used when both parties are entities)

fields.name: party_a_person_name
fields.description: First Party individual name (used when First Party is a natural person)

fields.name: party_b_company_name
fields.description: Second Party entity name (Second Party is always an entity)

fields.name: city
fields.description: City where the MOU is signed; appears in the date-and-place block

fields.name: party_a_address
fields.description: Registered office or residential address of the First Party

fields.name: party_b_address
fields.description: Registered office address of the Second Party

fields.name: signing_date
fields.description: Date the MOU is executed; the execution timestamp is the drafting moment, so it is recent-past-to-today (never future).

fields.name: term_months
fields.description: Initial term of the understanding in months

fields.name: jurisdiction_city
fields.description: City whose courts have exclusive jurisdiction; may differ from city of execution

fields.name: contribution_amount
fields.description: Financial contribution or indicative consideration under the financial-arrangements clause

fields.name: notice_period_days
fields.description: Days of prior written notice required for termination

fields.name: party_a_signatory_name
fields.placeholder: [NAME OF AUTHORISED SIGNATORY OF FIRST PARTY]
fields.description: Authorised signatory signing for the First Party entity

fields.name: party_b_signatory_name
fields.placeholder: [NAME OF AUTHORISED SIGNATORY OF SECOND PARTY]
fields.description: Authorised signatory signing for the Second Party entity

fields.name: witness_one_name
fields.description: Attesting witness named in the signature block
